basic_details.job_title: NISER Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.niser.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation for entitled categories as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemistry from a recognized institute
qualification.details: PhD in Chemistry from a recognized institute

salary_details.details: Rs. ₹58,000/- Per Month plus HRA as per rules

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NISER Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate-I position at NISER Bhubaneswar is 24-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Chemistry from a recognized institute to be eligible for the Research Associate-I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate-I position is 35 years, with relaxation applicable for entitled categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹58,000/- per month, plus HRA as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NISER Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure you send your complete bio-data and required documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for this interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate-I position announced in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NISER located?
faq.answer: NISER is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NISER / R&D / CH2602 / 05 / 2026-27.
